display.purpose: Hero amounts and large balance figures. Always tabular-nums.

headline.purpose: Page titles and section headers via text-heading utility.

title.purpose: Card titles, row primary labels, user names.

body.purpose: Descriptions, metadata, form labels. Max 65–75ch in prose.

label.purpose: Uppercase eyebrows and metric labels at 11px.

shadows.name: shadow-xs
shadows.purpose: Subtle resting elevation on inputs and outline buttons.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Default shadcn card shadow, icon containers.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: FAB, drawer chrome, active tab lift.

shadows.name: shadow-stitch-section
shadows.purpose: Large section cards and balance hero on dark Stitch surfaces.

shadows.name: shadow-stitch-cta
shadows.purpose: Full-width primary CTA on onboarding and modal footers.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition-all on buttons and color state changes.

motion.name: ease-out-press
motion.purpose: FAB and CTA active:scale-[0.97–0.98] press feedback, 150ms.

motion.name: spring-auth
motion.purpose: Auth card entrance via framer-motion (y 12→0, opacity 0→1).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default shadcn action — navigation CTAs, form submits, modal confirmations.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: var(--font-spline-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.141 0.036 271); background: oklch(0.764 0.12 266); border: none; border-radius: 0.375rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.764 0.12 266) 90%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.764 0.12 266) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Expense-tinted destructive action — delete confirmations, not full red fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: var(--font-spline-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.8 0.09 22); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.8 0.09 22) 15%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.8 0.09 22) 35%, transparent); border-radius: 0.375rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; outline: none; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.8 0.09 22) 25%, transparent); border-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.8 0.09 22) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.8 0.09 22) 35%, transparent); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field on dark vault surfaces.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-family: var(--font-spline-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.944 0.026 272); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.298 0.101 264) 30%, transparent); border: 1px solid oklch(0.298 0.101 264); border-radius: 0.375rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 oklch(0% 0 0 / 0.05); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.758 0.059 267); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.764 0.12 266); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.764 0.12 266) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Stitch Section Card
components.description: Dashboard section container — home, budgets, transactions list grouping.
components.css: .ds-card-stitch { padding: 1rem; border-radius: 1rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.5 0.174 266) 20%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.257 0.092 264) 90%, transparent); box-shadow: 0 16px 36px rgba(0, 7, 30, 0.28), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); color: oklch(0.944 0.026 272); font-family: var(--font-spline-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-card-stitch-eyebrow { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.764 0.12 266); } .ds-card-stitch-value { margin: 0; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(0.764 0.12 266); }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Transaction and list filter pill — active and inactive states.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: var(--font-spline-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.025em; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; outline: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-active { color: oklch(0.944 0.026 272); background: oklch(0.326 0.098 263); border: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(143, 176, 255, 0.28); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.764 0.12 266); }

components.name: Bottom Nav Active Item
components.description: Active tab in the five-item mobile bottom navigation.
components.html: Home
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 0; min-height: 2.75rem; min-width: 0; padding: 0.125rem 0.25rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; outline: none; } .ds-nav-item-active { color: oklch(0.764 0.12 266); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.764 0.12 266) 20%, transparent); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 oklch(0% 0 0 / 0.08), inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.764 0.12 266) 20%, transparent); } .ds-nav-icon { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-label { max-width: 5.25rem; text-align: center; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; overflow-wrap: anywhere; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.764 0.12 266), 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.141 0.036 271); }

components.name: Stitch Primary CTA
components.description: Full-width uppercase CTA on onboarding and modal footers.
components.css: .ds-cta-stitch { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.625rem; width: 100%; min-height: 3.25rem; padding: 1rem 1.25rem; font-family: var(--font-spline-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.141 0.036 271); background: oklch(0.764 0.12 266); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.764 0.12 266) 40%, transparent); border-radius: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(0, 16, 70, 0.45); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); outline: none; } .ds-cta-stitch:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.764 0.12 266) 90%, transparent); border-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.764 0.12 266) 55%, transparent); } .ds-cta-stitch:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-cta-stitch:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(0, 16, 70, 0.45), 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.764 0.12 266) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Income Amount
components.description: Canonical positive financial figure via Amount primitive styling.
components.css: .ds-amount { font-family: var(--font-spline-sans, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-amount-income { color: oklch(0.86 0.13 155); }

narrative.overview:
Wealth Pillar is a product-only surface: the app UI is the brand. The visual system serves Italian households managing shared finances on a phone after dinner or a laptop on Sunday morning. The aesthetic is confident dark craft in the Revolut and Apple Wallet lane: a deep navy vault where numbers read as definitive, motion means something, and chroma is earned rather than sprayed.

Density is mobile-first but never cramped. Surfaces are solid Stitch navy layers with subtle inset highlights, not glass cards floating in purple void. Typography is a single humanist sans (Spline Sans) with weight and tracking doing the hierarchy work. The emotional register from PRODUCT.md is Affidabile, Calmo, Preciso: shoulders drop when the app opens; nothing shouts for attention except what the user came to verify.
keyCharacteristics: Committed color strategy: primary violet-blue carries navigation, CTAs, and active states across 30–50% of any screen
OKLCH-only token pipeline in Tailwind v4 @theme; no raw #000 or #fff
Stitch solid surfaces: border-border/20–35, inset white hairlines, no decorative gradients
Tabular-nums financial figures with semantic income/expense color used sparingly
shadcn new-york primitives extended by home-design-foundation.ts class-string layer
Motion: framer-motion for swipe/auth; CSS transitions elsewhere; always prefers-reduced-motion safe
Touch targets ≥ 44×44pt on mobile shell; focus rings at 3px ring-ring/50

rules.name: The Committed Surface Rule
rules.body: Primary appears on navigation chrome, CTAs, active tabs, and hero figures. It is not rationed to ≤10%; its presence defines the product. Restraint lives in semantic colors (income/expense/destructive), not in hiding the brand hue.

rules.name: The Semantic Sparingly Rule
rules.body: --color-income and --color-expense appear only on amounts, progress indicators, and destructive confirmations — never on backgrounds, never as decorative gradients. Color is never the sole signal; pair with weight, sign, or icon.

rules.name: The Numbers Rule
rules.body: All financial amounts use tabular-nums. Hero figures get tracking-[-0.02em]. Amount component is the canonical renderer — do not hand-style currency strings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards at rest use border + inset highlight, not drop shadow. Shadows respond to elevation (drawer, modal, FAB) or interaction — not to filling space.

dos: Do use OKLCH semantic tokens from app/globals.css — never hardcode hex in components.
Do apply tabular-nums on every currency, balance, and percentage display.
Do pair income/expense/destructive color with iconography, sign prefix, or weight — never color alone.
Do use Stitch solid surfaces (stitchSurface.card, stitchHome.sectionCard) for dashboard sections.
Do ship prefers-reduced-motion and motion-reduce:* on every new animation or transition.
Do keep touch targets at ≥ 44×44pt on the mobile shell (bottom nav, FAB, header actions).
Do use uppercase 11px eyebrows for section labels — one per section, not on every element.
Do hedge investment and forecast UI with explicit disclaimer copy alongside muted visual treatment.
donts: Don't use purple/violet glow, glassmorphism as default, gradient text, or vibrant gradient on dark — the generic AI-startup aesthetic is forbidden.
Don't deploy rainbow categories, cartoon icons, gamification badges, streak counters, or confetti — household finance is not a phone game.
Don't use aggressive neon greens/reds, Robinhood-style hype, or decorative candlesticks — crypto-bro neon is forbidden.
Don't use navy-and-gold gradients, heavy chrome, regulatory-formal density, or PSD2-bank aesthetic — boomer Italian banking is forbidden.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards, list items, or alerts.
Don't wrap numbers in decorative containers — no hero-metric template (big number + gradient accent + supporting stat grid cliché).
Don't default to nested cards — prefer flat list rows with inset hairlines inside section cards.
Don't reach for modals when inline expansion, drawers, or bottom sheets solve the flow.
Don't enable .liquid-glass or .liquid-shimmer on financial data surfaces — shimmer is for loading states only, glass is non-default.
